# zlib

- Upstream: zlib
- Current in-repo source: historical Omni-bot vendored `zlib123`
- Canonical repo path: `third_party/zlib`
- Consumers:
  - RTCW game-module build used by replay archive compression

This directory is now the owned source of truth for zlib in this repo. Older references under `0.83/Omnibot/dependencies/physfs/zlib123` remain only as compatibility symlinks during the transition.
